projectDescription: A geospatial data API that returns provenance-tagged terrain, risk, and environmental data for any US coordinate from authoritative federal datasets, with per-field citations for audit trails.
keyFeatures: Natural-language Q&A over any US coordinate with cited answers (POST /v1/ask)
Deterministic field-level data access with 47+ catalog fields and 8 presets (POST /v1/fetch)
Per-field provenance — source, source_url, fetched_at, and confidence on every value
Authoritative federal data only: USGS, NOAA, USDA, USFS, EPA, EIA, FAA, and more
Honest partial-failure semantics — failed fields surface in partial_failures, never silently dropped
MCP server for Claude Desktop, Cursor, and custom AI agents
Field catalog endpoint with ETag caching for long-lived clients (GET /v1/meta/fields)
US-only coverage with structured coordinate validation and error responses
publicApiSurface: POST /v1/fetch — deterministic per-field data with provenance
GET /v1/meta/fields — versioned field and preset catalog
Presets: terrain, flood_risk, wildfire_underwrite, land_cover, site_selection, building_lookup, utilities, boundaries
